postCreateCommand: curl 'https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip' -o 'awscliv2.zip' && unzip -o awscliv2.zip && sudo ./aws/install --update && rm -rf awscliv2.zip aws && curl -O 'https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.15.3/terraform_1.15.3_linux_amd64.zip' && unzip -o terraform_1.15.3_linux_amd64.zip terraform && sudo mv terraform /usr/local/bin/ && rm terraform_1.15.3_linux_amd64.zip
